solve(nums, queries) ->
    N = length(nums),
    Trees = [fenwick_tree:new(N) || _ <- lists:seq(0, 5)],
    % Precompute depths for each number
    lists:foreach(fun(I) ->

        case Q of

                    true ->
                        ok
                end
        end

fenwick_tree:range_query(Tree, L, R) ->

compute_depth(X) ->
    Depth = 0,
    Current = X,
    loop(Current, Depth, 0).

loop(1, Depth, _) ->

loop(Current, Depth, _) ->

loop_depth(Current, Depth, Count) ->

    NewDepth = Depth + 1,

        true -> loop_depth(Next, NewDepth, Count)

    Tree1.

update_fenwick_helper(Size, Tree, Index, Delta) ->
    Index1 = Index,
    Tree1 = update_fenwick_helper(Size, Tree, Index1, Delta, []),
    Tree1.

update_fenwick_helper(_, Tree, Index, Delta, Acc) when Index > Size ->
    lists:reverse(Acc, Tree);
update_fenwick_helper(Size, Tree, Index, Delta, Acc) ->
    NewTree = lists:sublist(Tree, Index-1) ++ [Tree[Index] + Delta] ++ lists:sublist(Tree, Index+1, Size+1 - Index),
